svg.text: AI chat client built around Hermes
Hermes is an autonomous AI agent with real
CloudChat adds routing, live preview, and a
Supports 17 providers and ships as a native
AUTONOMOUS AI AGENT WITH REAL TOOL ACCESS
Toolsets: web, browser, terminal, files, code execution, vision.
Repo tools + changeset diffs make edits reviewable before PRs.
Routes by model/provider and can parallelize complex work.
17 providers, live preview, desktop app, themes, accents.
Bridge wraps Hermes, exposes repo tools, streams responses, and routes credentials.
Build clean; chunk-size warnings only. • Build time: 3.8s.
HermesPTYPanel + DockedMiniBrowser wired. • Sidebar layout: 60/40 flex.
Slash commands: 9 of 26 implemented. • E2E tests: not run yet.
Largest warning: 2.3MB chunk. • Source: STATUS.md build audit.
In-app “Report Issue” pre-fills version, OS, and
Checks: npm run typecheck, npm run lint, npm
Keep PRs focused: one concern per PR.
Python powers Hermes Bridge and agent-side
Local SVG→PNG replacement. Tuned for readability and CloudChat-specific fidelity.
